task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser shows the OpenMRS login screen or the main OpenMRS Administration page, with the URL bar indicating 'https://localhost/openmrs/admin' or similar.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the location management section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the 'Manage Locations' screen or a list of locations within the OpenMRS admin UI.

task_completion.description: Locate and select the target location 'Satellite Clinic East'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The location 'Satellite Clinic East' is visible in the locations list and is clicked or opened for editing.

task_completion.description: Enter the required reason for retiring the location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field for 'Retire Reason' (or similar) contains the exact text: 'Temporary location closed after community health drive'.

task_completion.description: Confirm the retirement and verify success.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Location retired successfully') is displayed, or 'Satellite Clinic East' is visibly marked as retired (e.g., struck through, moved to a retired list, or showing a 'true' status for retired) in the locations list.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser (like Chrome or Firefox) being used to navigate the OpenMRS interface, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine OpenMRS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI elements (buttons, forms, tables, headers) match the OpenMRS web application, not a generic text editor or a locally mocked HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using `curl`, `wget`, or direct database queries (like `mysql`) in a terminal window to retire the location.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Location: 'Satellite Clinic East'. Expected Retire Reason: 'Temporary location closed after community health drive'. Admin URL: 'https://localhost/openmrs/admin'.
